title: Shin Eva New Teaser 01 29 21
wikitext:
[]: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by The_Max » Fri Jan 29, 2021 1:53 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fdqw_oqup-8 Dark Wunder has 7 purple cannons, something related to 7 eyes of god? Also interesting the grey "coffin" sign in Asuka plugsuit...

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by Lacissal » Fri Jan 29, 2021 2:07 pm Looking at the way 'EVANGELION' is written at the start, with a single white N like a shadow behind the regular N, have they ever written one of the titles like that before?

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Fri Jan 29, 2021 2:15 pm We had the exact same discussion the first time they aired 3.03 on TV and revealed the 3.0+1.0 title. Yes, all eyecatches on the New Movies have that N, with the color of the respective film. Red for 1.0, Orange for 2.0, Light Blue for 3.0 and White for 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by Lacissal » Fri Jan 29, 2021 2:47 pm Heaven Piercing Man wrote: We had the exact same discussion the first time they aired 3.03 on TV and revealed the 3.0+1.0 title.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Fri Jan 29, 2021 3:04 pm Lacissal on 4chan some people were speculating that Failures of Infinites may have the head of Rei / Lilith in reality. Imaginative if this realy happening, how macabre and disturbing it would be if their heads looked the same as Lilith's head in 3.0 before it exploded, I mean a face that looks like Yui and has got out eyes and that creepy expression.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by Lacissal » Fri Jan 29, 2021 3:13 pm ^I wouldn't be surprised if they grew Lilith/Rei heads at some point like the MP Evas do during Third Impact in EoE, and would follow on from all the creepy Rei faces behind Unit 13 in Lilith's Chamber. Though I'd say from looking closely that they probably have face of Mk 10. There's one that's facing towards the camera, but with it's head tilted back, you can make out the pointed 'beak' like part of the face. edit- if you go through frame by frame, at 7 seconds on the centre right side, you can see the pointed beak

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by FXArmaros98 » Fri Jan 29, 2021 3:28 pm Lacissal,thanks for telling me. I wouldn't be surprised if they grew Lilith/Rei heads at some point like the MP Evas do during Third Impact in EoE, and would follow on from all the creepy Rei faces behind Unit 13 in Lilith's Chamber.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jan 29, 2021 5:04 pm Did Shinji's old plugsuit already have those red elements? You know shit got real when even Mari is doing an "Oh crap!" face. The shot with the falling white EVAs looks amazing

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jan 29, 2021 5:28 pm Kendrix wrote: Did Shinji's old plugsuit already have those red elements?

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Jan 29, 2021 5:53 pm The_Max wrote: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fdqw_oqup-8 Dark Wunder has 7 purple cannons, something related to 7 eyes of god? Also interesting the grey "coffin" sign in Asuka plugsuit...

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by The_Max » Fri Jan 29, 2021 6:52 pm ^ well, the last time we saw white EVAs bad things happened Waiting for a translation of what Misato says in the Teaser, I only catch names and "sayonara, subete no Evangelion"

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by EscapismIsBad » Fri Jan 29, 2021 7:00 pm Isn't white supposed to represent death in Japan and that's the reason the MPE are white? If that's true then the white plugsuit were always a big hint.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jan 29, 2021 7:05 pm The_Max wrote: Waiting for a translation of what Misato says in the Teaser, I only catch names and "sayonara, subete no Evangelion" :D

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by Pluto » Fri Jan 29, 2021 7:10 pm FYI, this was the same trailer showed at the end of 3.333. So glad to be able to view it in detail now

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Jan 29, 2021 8:11 pm The only real new footage from the trailer Shinji looks almost in his twenties here (which he actually technically is). Stark contrast from the fresh wide eyed 14 year old he started out as

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by cyharding » Fri Jan 29, 2021 8:30 pm kuribo-04 wrote: The_Max#908866 wrote: Waiting for a translation of what Misato says in the Teaser, I only catch names and "sayonara, subete no Evangelion"

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jan 29, 2021 8:41 pm cyharding wrote: Based on that translation, it seems like the farewell is not to the franchise, but the individual Eva units that appeared in the films. Interesting.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by EscapismIsBad » Fri Jan 29, 2021 9:00 pm Pretty Shinji is best Shinji. Everyone is drop dead gorgeous in this movie.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Fri Jan 29, 2021 9:40 pm https://youtu.be/TfCJ-OYrSGI A nice compilation of all the shots released so far

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Teaser (01-29-21)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Fri Jan 29, 2021 10:04 pm kuribo-04 wrote: I think the way that phrase works in Japanese, it's intentionally ambiguous if it's "all Evas" or "all of Eva".
